Affinity (Interest) Audiences:
1. Audience 1: Very Specific Interests:
Example A: “Internet Marketing, Online marketing, Digital Marketing, Social media
Marketing, Content Marketing, Email Marketing”
Example B: “Conversion Funnel, Sales Funnel, Conversion Rate Optimization, Split
Testing, Landing Page.
2. Audience 2: Tools And Resources
a. “Clickfunnels, Unbounce, Instapage, Leadpages, Samcart, Kartra”
b. “Infusionsoft, Mailchimp, Hubspot, Aweber, Kartra, Constant Contact, Active
Campaign”
3. Audience 3: Competitor Names
a. “Russell Brunson, Sam Ovens, Traffic and Funnels, Jason Hornung, Alex Becker,
Russ Ruffino”
4. Audience 4: Relevant Websites
a. Tools: “Hyros.com, Clickfunnels.com, Leadpages.com, DigitalMarketer.com,
HardCoreCloser.com”
5. Audience 5: (Optional) App users
a. Example: Everyone who uses Facebook ads manager app
Custom Keyword Audiences
1. Audience 1: Competitor Keywords
2. Audience 2: How-ish to Keywords: “Calm crying baby” “Train your dog” “Stop dog from
jumping” “Install pixel”
3. Audience 3: Specific Interest keywords” “Copywriting, automate your ads”
4. Audience 4: Completely Obvious Keywords “Increase sales” “Increase profits”
www.getwsodo.com
